hero.title: Windrose
hero.description: Windrose is a pirate survival adventure on Steam focused on ship combat, base building, open-world exploration, bosses, and co-op progression across land and sea.

gameFeature.title: Windrose Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Explore surreal biomes, fuse items with Apotheosis, and survive strange creatures in this dreamlike voxel sandbox on Steam.

lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Windrose Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Windrose gets much smoother once your opening route is structured. Secure coastal materials, establish a real starter camp, stabilize healing and food, then push caves, quests, and ship progression.

steps.title: Scavenge the beach before you chase combat
steps.description: Start on the shoreline for safe, efficient gathering. This route gives you core materials for tools and shelter without forcing risky early fights.

steps.title: Set a real day-one camp, not just a campfire
steps.description: Build a functional camp with respawn, crafting, cooking, and storage from the start so early deaths and inventory pressure do not reset momentum.

steps.title: Fight like a stamina game, not a shooter
steps.description: Early combat rewards blocks, parries, dodges, and posture breaks. Firearms are best used as finishers after creating a safe opening.

steps.title: Use map markers and bells to cut runback time
steps.description: Track resources and routes with markers, unlock your first bell quickly, and place travel points near dungeon entrances to remove repeated downtime.

steps.title: Build forward camps before bosses and ruins
steps.description: A small forward camp turns difficult content into efficient retries. Keep a tent outside hard zones to reset quickly after wipe or unload.

steps.title: Stabilize land progression before full sea progression
steps.description: Your biggest early gains come from base quality, survivability, and travel setup on land. Sailing value rises once those systems are stable.

quickTips: Prioritize wood, plant fiber, nails, scallop shells, loose stone, and riverbank clay in the opening route.
Starter camp core: bonfire, workbench, cooking fire, bed, and tent.
Carry at least 10 bandages and two food types before longer combat routes.
Bandages heal over time, so create space first and then recover.
Place bells outside dungeons so return trips stay short and repeatable.
Before Thomas Richards, prepare a weapon, firearm, food, potions, bandages, and a full armor set.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Windrose Release Date
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: Windrose is already live in Early Access. The useful release view is launch timing, current build status, and how the path toward 1.0 is developing.

cards.name: 2026-03-23 - Pre-launch update
cards.description: The demo period remained active until Early Access while the team outlined launch-quality improvements from large player feedback batches.

cards.name: 2026-04-09 - Release date confirmed
cards.description: The studio confirmed April 14, 2026 for Early Access launch with a base price of $29.99 and an announced Supporter Bundle.

cards.name: 2026-04-14 - Early Access live
cards.description: Windrose launched on Steam and Epic Games Store with optional co-op, a long-form main story, multiple biomes, and playable ship progression.

cards.name: 2026-04-17 - Launch-week hotfix
cards.description: Hotfix 0.10.0.2.54 improved online stability, outdated-server checks, invite code support, and boss scaling behavior for larger co-op groups.

cards.name: Late 2027 to Late 2028 - Estimated 1.0 window
cards.description: Current Early Access planning points to a 1.5-2.5 year development window from launch, with major content growth targeted for full release.

milestones: Current platform status: Steam + Epic Games Store
Current 1.0 target window: Late 2027 to Late 2028

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Windrose Multiplayer Guide
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Windrose co-op is straightforward once hosting, invite flow, world settings, and dedicated server options are mapped clearly.

items.name: Online co-op only
items.description: Windrose does not use local split-screen. Friends join from separate PCs online, and solo offline play is still available.

items.name: Convert a solo world into a co-op world
items.description: From Play -> Host a game, you can open an existing save, generate an invite code, and continue progression with friends in the same world.

items.name: Invite-code join flow
items.description: Players join through Connect to Server with an invite code. Once joined, the server can be saved for faster re-entry.

items.name: Configurable world rules for shared runs
items.description: Hosts can tune shared quest progression, enemy scaling behavior, and password-protected access to match the group setup.

items.name: Player cap up to 8, comfort range around 4
items.description: Dedicated server configs can support up to 8 players, while smaller crews are usually smoother for consistency and performance.

items.name: Dedicated servers for always-on worlds
items.description: The official dedicated server app keeps worlds online when hosts are away, with invite code output and version matching as core operations.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Windrose Best Stats and Talents
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Windrose early progression is strongest when you commit to one damage lane, secure stamina and health first, and choose talents that keep boss attempts stable.

solutions.name: Do not split your damage stats
solutions.description: Pick one damage lane and commit. Early split investment reduces combat efficiency more than a focused build with modest gear.

solutions.name: Build stamina and health before peak damage
solutions.description: The safest opener invests in Endurance and Vitality first, then scales the damage stat that matches your primary weapon family.

solutions.name: Understand support stats before spending
solutions.description: Mastery, Vitality, and Endurance each solve different combat pressure. Knowing their exact value prevents weak early allocation.

solutions.name: Prioritize survival talents early
solutions.description: Stamina, health, and damage resistance talents reduce wipe chains and make early caves and first bosses much more manageable.

solutions.name: Match your talent tree to your playstyle
solutions.description: Choose one tree based on fight style and commit long enough to feel the power curve, instead of scattering points across unrelated nodes.

managementTips: Strength scales clubs and halberds; Agility scales sabers, greatswords, and blunderbusses; Precision scales rapiers, pistols, and muskets.
Mastery grants +0.5% critical chance per point.
Just a Flesh Wound provides 6% / 9% / 12% melee damage resistance.
Too Angry to Die revives you at 30% health after a killing blow.
Fencer focuses fast melee DPS, Crusher focuses bruiser pressure, Marksman focuses ranged output, and Defender adds universal survivability.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Windrose Builds and Classes
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Qualia is one of the most important progression milestones in Windrose. It gives you a personal space to regroup, store materials, and gradually turn exploration progress into a real home base.

cards.name: Personal Qualia
cards.description: Unlocking a Qualia is an early milestone that gives you a more reliable place to return to while exploring the wider world.

cards.name: Storage-First Building
cards.description: Many players start using their Qualia as a storage hub before turning it into a larger base with organized crafting and building space.

cards.name: Creative Home Building
cards.description: Windrose supports creative building, and players are already using Qualia spaces to make houses and personalized layouts.

cards.name: Progression Hub
cards.description: A strong base helps you separate exploration loot, crafting materials, seeds, tools, and mobility gear so your next upgrades are easier to plan.

highlights: Use base space to support crafting and farming

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Windrose Best Weapons
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Windrose uses infinite world generation, so players keep discovering new environments and structures. A few named places are already showing up in achievements and community discussions.

regions.name: Fog Meadow
regions.description: Fog Meadow is already known among players as a tense area associated with hidden threats and dangerous encounters.

regions.name: Tiamana Leyline
regions.description: The tiamana leyline is important enough to have its own achievement milestone, making it one of the clearest named world discoveries so far.

regions.name: Clonaqualia
regions.description: Players are already using Clonaqualia as a place to build houses, store materials, and experiment with more permanent layouts.

regions.name: Essence Morass
regions.description: Essence Morass is being shared by players as a useful farming location, especially for fighting slimes and gaining experience.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Windrose Ship Guide
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Windrose mixes surreal creatures with real danger. Official descriptions and community posts point to a world full of strange life, hostile threats, and a few standout encounters players remember quickly.

creatures.name: Manikins
creatures.description: Manikins are one of the officially named foes in the world and part of the game's surreal threat roster.

creatures.name: Squishy Gels
creatures.description: Squishy gels are another officially named enemy type and help define the game's strange biological style.

creatures.name: Higher-Dimensional Beings
creatures.description: These beings are presented as part of the world's more abstract and unsettling enemy lineup.

creatures.name: Colossal Spiders
creatures.description: Spiders are one of the most immediately feared enemies in community discussions and are clearly a memorable danger.

creatures.name: Bubblebear
creatures.description: Bubblebear is notable enough to have its own achievement, which makes it one of the clearest named creature encounters in the game.

creatures.name: Cute Vermin
creatures.description: Vermin are not only part of fusion progression, they can also be renamed, giving them a more personal role than standard enemies.

creatures.name: Blasphemous Creature
creatures.description: The blasphemous creature is tied to a dedicated combat achievement, marking it as a significant enemy encounter.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Windrose Boss Guide
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Movement upgrades are one of the biggest quality-of-life jumps in Windrose. Once you unlock your first traversal tools, exploration becomes faster, safer, and much more rewarding.

items.name: Hookshot
items.description: The hookshot is one of the clearest movement milestones in the game and has its own dedicated achievement.

items.name: Glider Glove
items.description: The glider glove opens up much smoother travel and is another major progression milestone with its own achievement.

items.name: Bee Glider
items.description: Bee gliders are officially highlighted as part of the game's movement toolkit for covering space more efficiently.

items.name: Ball Wand
items.description: Ball wands are one of the officially highlighted special tools and expand how you move through or interact with the world.

items.name: Scuba Diving Gear
items.description: Scuba diving gear is officially listed as part of the core utility set for reaching areas that would otherwise be harder to explore.

items.name: Explosives
items.description: Explosives are both officially highlighted and linked to an achievement milestone, making them part of the game's core utility progression.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Windrose Crafting Stations
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Growth is part of real progression in Windrose. Farming is not only about planting and harvesting, but also about setting up repeatable material routes that keep your tools, weapons, and crafting options flowing.

sections.name: Seed Progression
sections.description: Planting and fertilizing seeds is a real milestone in the game, and harvesting a fully-grown nut is part of the same growth path.

sections.name: Material Farming
sections.description: A practical early farming loop is creating Mercury Capsules, which spawn small slimes that drop Tendrils and goo for repeatable crafting materials.

sections.name: Tool Sustain
sections.description: Resource farming becomes much stronger once you can consistently gather Osmium, glass shards, plants, and slime materials for follow-up crafts.

sections.name: Base Routine
sections.description: The best farming setup supports more than food. It should feed your storage, movement tools, weapon upgrades, and future fusion experiments.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Windrose Resources Guide
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: The strongest early unlocks are the ones that improve safety, storage, and movement. In Windrose, a few practical upgrades can make the entire rest of the game much smoother.

priorities.name: Personal Qualia
priorities.description: As soon as you get access to your personal Qualia, your run becomes much more stable. It acts as a reliable hub for storage, building, and regrouping.

priorities.name: Frost Pick
priorities.description: A fast and cheap early mining tool made from Osmium and Stick. It is one of the most useful upgrades for accelerating early resource collection.

priorities.name: Cache Cube
priorities.description: Storage pressure starts early, so getting your first dependable chest-style container is a major quality-of-life upgrade.

priorities.name: Hookshot
priorities.description: The hookshot is one of the clearest movement milestones in the game and quickly makes exploration faster and safer.

priorities.name: Glider Glove
priorities.description: The glider glove adds another major mobility boost and makes long-distance movement far more efficient.

priorities.name: Projectile Wand or Bombs
priorities.description: A ranged tool or explosive option gives you a safer answer to dangerous enemies and trial-style encounters.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Windrose Map and Biomes
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Windrose currently has 19 Steam achievements, and they naturally split into exploration, crafting, mobility, combat, and growth progression.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Windrose Fast Travel
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: These are the core platform and access questions players keep asking before buying Windrose.

faqs.question: Is multiplayer or co-op planned in Windrose?
faqs.answer: Windrose already supports online co-op and dedicated server play.

faqs.question: Where can I play Windrose?
faqs.answer: Windrose is available on Steam and Epic Games Store.

faqs.question: How much does Windrose cost?
faqs.answer: Windrose launched with a $29.99 base price and an optional Supporter Bundle.

faqs.question: Does Windrose support controllers?
faqs.answer: Yes. Windrose supports controller input, though many players prefer keyboard and mouse for menu-heavy workflows.

faqs.question: Does Windrose work on Steam Deck?
faqs.answer: Windrose can run on Steam Deck with compatibility-layer tuning based on current patch behavior.

faqs.question: Does Windrose work on Linux?
faqs.answer: Windrose can be played through compatibility layers on Linux setups that match the active build requirements.

faqs.question: Will Windrose support Mac or Android?
faqs.answer: No official Mac or Android launch target has been confirmed for Windrose.

faqs.question: Does Windrose have translations?
faqs.answer: Windrose supports multiple interface languages, including English, German, Russian, and Portuguese (Brazil).

faqs.question: Will Windrose keep getting updates?
faqs.answer: Yes. Windrose is in active Early Access development with ongoing fixes and content iteration.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Windrose System Requirements
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Windrose can run on Steam Deck, but the default setup may need adjustment. Keyboard and mouse remains the smoother option for menus and general play.

faqs.question: Does Windrose work on Steam Deck?
faqs.answer: Windrose can run on Steam Deck, and performance depends on your selected compatibility layer and graphics profile.

faqs.question: What should I do if Windrose Steam Deck controls are not working?
faqs.answer: Force compatibility mode, test a current Proton profile, and restart after control-layout sync.

faqs.question: Does Windrose support controllers?
faqs.answer: Yes. Windrose supports controller input on PC and handheld setups.

faqs.question: Is Linux support possible for Windrose?
faqs.answer: Yes. Windrose can be played through Linux compatibility layers when runtime dependencies are met.

faqs.question: What is the best Windrose input setup?
faqs.answer: Keyboard and mouse remain the most efficient setup for precision menu navigation and combat timing.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Windrose Dedicated Server Guide
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Windrose already has a few practical settings and compatibility notes that matter immediately when players first launch the game.

settings.name: Display Settings
settings.description: Display Settings includes an option that lets players hide the on-screen hands.

settings.name: Graphics Compatibility
settings.description: Vulkan support is required for the graphics to render properly. Systems without Vulkan can run into crashes and severe graphical glitches.

settings.name: Input Preference
settings.description: Controller support exists, but keyboard and mouse gives a smoother experience because menus are not built around controller use.

settings.name: Language Support
settings.description: The current setup is English-only, and no translations are planned right now.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Windrose Roadmap
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Windrose is already receiving quick post-launch fixes and small usability updates.

entries.title: Update 2.8.2
entries.description: Renamed "awaken" to "exit" in the main menu.

entries.title: Small Patch for Start-Up Crashes
entries.description: A dedicated patch was released for players whose game was crashing on launch.

entries.title: Post-Launch Content Support
entries.description: Some content updates are planned after release, but they are not intended to continue on an indefinite regular schedule.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: Windrose Update Log
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: Most immediate launch and crash issues should be checked in a simple order: patch level, graphics support, platform compatibility, and logs.

steps.title: Install the Latest Crash Hotfix
steps.description: If the game is crashing on start, update first and test again with the latest start-up crash patch.

steps.title: Check Vulkan Support
steps.description: Windrose requires Vulkan support. Systems without Vulkan can suffer from crashes or major rendering problems.

steps.title: Use Proton 9.0.4 on Steam Deck
steps.description: If Steam Deck input or launch behavior is broken, force compatibility and switch to Proton 9.0.4.

steps.title: Collect Crash Logs
steps.description: Open Windows Run, paste %APPDATA%, go to windrose/logs, and gather the .txt files for troubleshooting.

steps.title: Report the Issue Properly
steps.description: Share the logs and device details through the official Discord bug-reports forum or on the Steam community page.

faq.title: Windrose Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything players ask most about Windrose right now.

questions.question: Is Windrose singleplayer or co-op?
questions.answer: Windrose supports solo play and online co-op. You can start alone and later host the same world for friends.

questions.question: How does Windrose multiplayer joining work?
questions.answer: Windrose uses invite-code joining through Connect to Server, with saved server access after the first connection.

questions.question: What should I prioritize in Windrose during the first hours?
questions.answer: Focus on coastal resource loops, a full starter camp, healing stock, and stamina-first combat habits before pushing harder zones.

questions.question: When did Windrose release in Early Access?
questions.answer: Windrose launched in Early Access on April 14, 2026, and continues receiving launch-window updates.

questions.question: Where can I play Windrose today?
questions.answer: Windrose is available on Steam and Epic Games Store, with official updates posted through the game site and Steam news.

questions.question: What is the current Windrose full-release window?
questions.answer: Current planning points to a late 2027 to late 2028 window for the Windrose 1.0 release cycle.

cta.title: Ready to Sail in Windrose?
cta.description: Join the official Windrose Discord to track patches, share builds, and stay updated with sea survival news.
